content: The pending/done inbox split serves as the trigger mechanism for the behaviour tree. The agent checks if pending/ has files — that branch fires the triage handler. Inbox sits in the 'urgent zone' at the top of the behaviour tree: [inbox messages?] → Handle inbox (triage → Octowiki). The intentional repo maps to the blog post architecture: Inbox=lossless capture (pending/done), Triage=signal extraction into wiki, Octowiki=fractal markdown wiki (authoritative spec), Characterisation tests=derived from wiki invariants, CodeHealth/Octoclean=continuous audit of code vs wiki.

provenance.raw_agent: The pending/done split isn't just a file organisation choice — it's the trigger mechanism for the behaviour tree. The agent checks pending/ exists and has files → that branch fires.
